description: Ambiguity / conservatism test. Only the mobile-checkout perf signal is concrete enough to become a story. Other hedges ('the vibes are off', 'more rewarding loyalty') must NOT become stories.

required_topics.rationale: The single hedged-but-concrete signal in the transcript.

forbidden_topics.rationale: Pure vibes feedback is not a backlog item.
Marketing wish, not an engineering ask.
